summary: M5 Florida public launch polish + RONSP filing tracker + notary recruitment portal — backend 16/16 pytest green, frontend all critical flows green: /florida CTA + 4-stat live grid + RONSP banner render, /florida/notaries form submit returns 'received' success card with lead_id, admin pages (/admin/fl-recruitment, /admin/fl-ronsp) render with full test-id coverage and modals open with audit logs, /admin/fl-compliance has new Recruitment/RONSP nav buttons. M3/M4 regression unaffected.

ui_bugs.issue: React hydration warnings in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' and '<span> cannot be a child of <select>'. Invalid HTML inside the lead-volume <select>; works functionally but should wrap labels in plain text, not <span>.

action_items: Replace … children inside the monthly-volume
critical_code_review_comments: fl_launch_routes.py — all endpoints correctly: (a) exclude _id via projection, (b) use async motor properly, (c) admin-gate via _require_admin, (d) append audit_log on create/patch, (e) mirror approved RONSP filings into state_compliance_profiles. Email notification properly wrapped in try/except so it cannot block lead creation.
Idempotency window for recruitment lead is implemented via {email lowercased, created_at >= now-30d} check before insert — works as specified.
VOLUME_BUCKETS and LEAD_STATUSES / RONSP_STATUSES are validated server-side returning 400 on invalid values. Confirmed via tests.
FloridaLanding.jsx fetches public-stats + ronsp/filings/current in parallel and only renders the RONSP banner when active && filing present — correct behavior verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical M5 flows (1 cosmetic hydration warning)

test_credentials: Admin admin@notarychain.com / Admin123! (login API returns access_token).
seed_data_creation: Test run created additional RONSP filings (TEST_filing_*) and recruitment leads (test_m5_*, patch_m5_*, ui_test_*, ui_m5_*, ui_m5b_*). These are TEST_-prefixed where applicable and safe to leave in the dev DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: M5 endpoints live at /api/fl/launch/public-stats (public), /api/fl/ronsp/filings + /current (current is public), /api/fl/recruitment/lead (public) and /api/fl/recruitment/leads|/stats|/{id} (admin). Login token field is 'access_token'. Use pytest file /app/backend/tests/test_fl_launch_m5.py for regression. Frontend public routes: /florida, /florida/notaries; protected admin routes: /admin/fl-recruitment, /admin/fl-ronsp, /admin/fl-compliance (with new goto buttons).
rca of the issue: No production-blocking issues. The only finding is a minor React hydration warning on /florida/notaries from <span> elements used inside the monthly-volume <select>'s <option> tags — invalid HTML per spec, but it does not break submission and the success card with lead_id is rendered correctly. RCA: developer wrapped option labels in <span> for styling — fix is to use plain text or move styling to the parent <select>.
